  "findings": [
    "PVC conduit joints joined with wrong glue and no primer, violating manufacturer instructions and code requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work on the affected PVC conduit run.",
    "Cut out and remove the improperly glued joints.",
    "Re-assemble the conduit run using the correct PVC primer and solvent cement in accordance with manufacturer specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 352.48 requires all joint connections to be made in an approved manner. Using the wrong glue and omitting primer compromises the physical integrity and liquid-tight seal of the PVC conduit system, which is a critical failure in an industrial environment.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Art. 352.48",
    "UL 651"
  ]
}
